description: Display a message banner at the top of the screen under the menu bar. Supported only in client scripts.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a message that can be shown or hidden near the top of the page.

params.name: options.duration
params.description: Amount of time (in milliseconds) to show the message. Set to 0 to show indefinitely.

enums.name: Type
enums.description: The type of message to display, which determines background color and indicator.

objectTypes.name: Message
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates a message object created by message.create(options).

methods.name: show
methods.description: Shows the message. Optionally set a duration (in milliseconds) after which the message is automatically hidden.

params.name: options.duration
params.description: Time in milliseconds to show the message. Default 0 shows until hide() is called. String values are parsed to number.
